const contract = {"version":"1.0.0","description":"Strict n8n workflow contracts for MCA Phase 1 content publishing","global":{"publish_modes":["page","section_only","faq_only","hold"],"required_sequence_for_page_mode":["POST /api/pages/upsert","POST /api/pages/section (for each section)","POST /api/pages/faq (for each faq)","POST /api/pages/publish","POST /api/revalidate"],"required_sequence_for_section_only":["POST /api/pages/section (for each section)","POST /api/pages/faq (optional)","POST /api/revalidate"],"required_sequence_for_faq_only":["POST /api/pages/faq (for each faq)","POST /api/revalidate"],"hold_mode_behavior":"Only call POST /api/keywords/upsert with usage_type=hold. Do not call page/section/faq/publish routes."},"contracts":{"common_page_payload":{"endpoint":"POST /api/pages/upsert","required_fields":["slug","full_path","page_template","page_group","title","meta_title","meta_description","h1","status","indexable","publish_mode"],"optional_fields":["intro_html","body_html","canonical_url"],"rules":{"title_max_chars":70,"meta_title_max_chars":60,"meta_description_range_chars":[110,165],"canonical_url_must_match_path_or_primary_canonical":true,"status_allowed":["draft","published","archived"],"publish_mode_allowed":["page","section_only","faq_only","hold"]}},"section_payload":{"endpoint":"POST /api/pages/section","required_fields":["target_page_slug","section_key","content_html","sort_order"],"optional_fields":["section_label","heading","keyword_theme"]},"faq_payload":{"endpoint":"POST /api/pages/faq","required_fields":["target_page_slug","question","answer_html","schema_enabled"],"optional_fields":["keyword"],"rules":{"question_min_chars":10,"question_max_chars":140,"answer_html_min_chars":80}}},"templates":{"type":{"route_pattern":"/types/{slug}","page_group":"types","required_section_keys":["hero","definition","suitability","repayment","speed","eligibility","pros_cons","use_cases","sector_fit","related_links"],"recommended_order":["hero","definition","suitability","repayment","speed","eligibility","pros_cons","use_cases","sector_fit","related_links"],"min_faq_count":3,"fail_conditions":["Any required_section_keys missing","Section keys present but out of recommended_order index without explicit override","Duplicate section_key within same page payload","meta_title missing primary keyword phrase","intro_html empty","Less than 3 FAQs when publish_mode=page"]},"sector":{"route_pattern":"/sectors/{slug}","page_group":"sectors","required_section_keys":["hero","sector_need","cashflow_gaps","use_cases","repayment_fit","eligibility","related_types","related_links"],"recommended_order":["hero","sector_need","cashflow_gaps","use_cases","repayment_fit","eligibility","related_types","related_links"],"min_faq_count":3,"fail_conditions":["Any required_section_keys missing","No cashflow_gaps section","No related_types section","H1 does not include sector intent phrase","Duplicate section_key within same page payload","Less than 3 FAQs when publish_mode=page"]},"guide":{"route_pattern":"/guides/{slug}","page_group":"guides","required_section_keys":["hero","summary","process_steps","costs","repayment","pros_cons","alternatives","cta"],"recommended_order":["hero","summary","process_steps","costs","repayment","pros_cons","alternatives","cta"],"min_faq_count":2,"fail_conditions":["Any required_section_keys missing","process_steps section missing","No alternatives section","Duplicate section_key within same page payload","Less than 2 FAQs when publish_mode=page"]},"comparison":{"route_pattern":"/compare/{slug}","page_group":"compare","required_section_keys":["hero","quick_verdict","comparison_table","when_mca_wins","when_other_wins","cost_comparison","speed_comparison","eligibility_comparison","cta"],"recommended_order":["hero","quick_verdict","comparison_table","when_mca_wins","when_other_wins","cost_comparison","speed_comparison","eligibility_comparison","cta"],"min_faq_count":2,"fail_conditions":["Any required_section_keys missing","comparison_table section missing","No when_mca_wins or when_other_wins section","Duplicate section_key within same page payload","Less than 2 FAQs when publish_mode=page"]},"faq":{"route_pattern":"/faqs/{slug}","page_group":"faqs","required_section_keys":["hero","short_answer","expanded_answer","approval_factors","related_links","cta"],"recommended_order":["hero","short_answer","expanded_answer","approval_factors","related_links","cta"],"min_faq_count":1,"fail_conditions":["Any required_section_keys missing","short_answer section missing","expanded_answer section missing","Duplicate section_key within same page payload","No FAQ record created when publish_mode=faq_only"]},"use_case":{"route_pattern":"/use-cases/{slug}","page_group":"use-cases","required_section_keys":["hero","why_this_use_case","when_it_makes_sense","risks_limits","alternatives","cta"],"recommended_order":["hero","why_this_use_case","when_it_makes_sense","risks_limits","alternatives","cta"],"min_faq_count":2,"fail_conditions":["Any required_section_keys missing","risks_limits section missing","alternatives section missing","Duplicate section_key within same page payload","Less than 2 FAQs when publish_mode=page"]}},"strict_validation_for_n8n":{"keyword_router_output_required_fields":["primary_keyword","publish_mode","page_template","page_group","slug","full_path","parent_page_slug"],"block_on":["publish_mode/page_template mismatch","route does not match route_pattern for template","section_key not allowed for selected template","duplicate slug targeting another full_path","body text appears duplicate above threshold from existing page in same group","missing authorization token","api response status >= 400"],"retry_policy":{"max_retries":3,"backoff_seconds":[2,5,15],"retry_on_status_codes":[429,500,502,503,504]}},"example_n8n_router_output":{"primary_keyword":"merchant cash advance for restaurants","secondary_keywords":["restaurant cash advance","mca loan for restaurants"],"publish_mode":"page","page_template":"sector","page_group":"sectors","slug":"restaurant","full_path":"/sectors/restaurant","parent_page_slug":null,"search_intent":"commercial"}};
return [{ json: { contract, _meta: { source: 'workflow-json-contracts.phase1.json', version: contract.version } } }];
